title: Pre-trained Models Path
description: Build fluency in Pre-trained Models inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: ALBERT (A Lite BERT)
steps.summary: ** ALBERT (A Lite BERT) belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after BERT and ALBERT.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: GPT-4o
steps.summary: GPT-4o belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after GPT and GPT-J. It opens into OpenAI GPT-4o and OpenAI GPT-4o mini.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: LLaMA-Adapter
steps.summary: LLaMA-Adapter belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after LLaMA and Llama 3. It opens into LLaMA-Adapter v2 and LLAMA-Adapter v3.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Transformer Variants
steps.summary: Transformer Variants belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after Transformer Models and Transformer. It opens into Transformer Variants (e.g., GPT, T5) and Transformer Variants (e.g., BERT, GPT, T5).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Generative Pretrained Transformer 5
steps.summary: Generative Pretrained Transformer 5 belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after Transformer Models and Transformer. It opens into Generative Pretrained Transformer 4o and Generative Pretrained Transformer 3 (GPT-3).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Generative Pretrained Transformer 4
steps.summary: Generative Pretrained Transformer 4 belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after Transformer Models and Transformer. It opens into Generative Pretrained Transformer 4o and Generative Pretrained Transformer 3 (GPT-3).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Generative Pretrained Transformer 3
steps.summary: Generative Pretrained Transformer 3 belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after Transformer Models and Transformer. It opens into Generative Pretrained Transformer 4o and Generative Pretrained Transformer 3 (GPT-3).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Transformer Models (e.g., BERT, GPT)
steps.summary: Transformer Models (e.g., BERT, GPT) belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after GPT and BERT. It opens into Transformer Models (e.g., BERT, GPT, T5) and Transformer Variants (e.g., BERT, GPT, T5).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
